strategyType: The type of options strategy to execute. Possible values: PUT_CREDIT_SPREAD, TECH_PUT_CREDIT_SPREAD, BULLISH_LONG_PUT_CREDIT_SPREAD, CALL_CREDIT_SPREAD, TECH_CALL_CREDIT_SPREAD, IRON_CONDOR, BULLISH_LONG_IRON_CONDOR, LONG_CALL_LEAP, BULLISH_BROKEN_WING_BUTTERFLY, BULLISH_ZEBRA.
securitiesFile: The name of the file containing the list of stock symbols to scan (e.g., 'portfolio', 'top100').
securities: A comma-separated list of individual stock symbols to include in the scan.
includeOnly: A list of ticker symbols. If specified, only options for these tickers will be considered, regardless of other security settings.
excludeIf: A list of ticker symbols to explicitly ignore, even if they match other security criteria.
targetDTE: The specific number of days until option expiration to target.
minDTE: The minimum number of days until option expiration.
maxDTE: The maximum number of days until option expiration.
maxLossLimit: The maximum dollar amount you are willing to lose on a single trade.
maxTotalDebit: The maximum total debit allowed for the entire trade.
maxTotalCredit: The maximum total credit allowed for the entire trade.
minTotalCredit: The minimum total credit required for the trade to be valid.
minReturnOnRisk: The minimum acceptable percentage return relative to the maximum risk (Max Loss).
minHistoricalVolatility: The minimum annualized historical volatility of the underlying security.
maxBreakEvenPercentage: The maximum percentage move against the trade required to reach the breakeven point.
maxUpperBreakevenDelta: The maximum delta allowed at the upper breakeven point.
maxNetExtrinsicValueToPricePercentage: The maximum annualized net extrinsic value relative to capital, as a percentage.
minNetExtrinsicValueToPricePercentage: The minimum annualized net extrinsic value relative to capital, as a percentage.
ignoreEarnings: If enabled, trades with an earnings announcement before expiration will be filtered out.
shortLeg.minDelta: The minimum delta for the short leg of the spread.
shortLeg.maxDelta: The maximum delta for the short leg of the spread.
shortLeg.minOpenInterest: The minimum open interest required for the short leg.
shortLeg.minVolume: The minimum daily volume required for the short leg.
shortLeg.minPremium: The minimum price (premium) for the short leg.
shortLeg.maxPremium: The maximum price (premium) for the short leg.
shortLeg.minVolatility: The minimum implied volatility for the short leg.
shortLeg.maxVolatility: The maximum implied volatility for the short leg.
longLeg.minDelta: The minimum delta for the long leg of the spread.
longLeg.maxDelta: The maximum delta for the long leg of the spread.
longLeg.minOpenInterest: The minimum open interest required for the long leg.
longLeg.minVolume: The minimum daily volume required for the long leg.
longLeg.minPremium: The minimum price (premium) for the long leg.
longLeg.maxPremium: The maximum price (premium) for the long leg.
longLeg.minVolatility: The minimum implied volatility for the long leg.
longLeg.maxVolatility: The maximum implied volatility for the long leg.
putShortLeg.minDelta: Minimum delta for the Put side short leg.
putLongLeg.minDelta: Minimum delta for the Put side long leg.
callShortLeg.minDelta: Minimum delta for the Call side short leg.
callLongLeg.minDelta: Minimum delta for the Call side long leg.
minCombinedCredit: Minimum total credit for an Iron Condor (Put + Call credit).
minCostSavingsPercent: Minimum percentage saved relative to buying the underlying stock.
minCostEfficiencyPercent: Minimum ratio of cost savings compared to risk reduction.
topTradesCount: The number of top-ranked trades to return.
maxCAGRForBreakEven: Maximum compound annual growth rate required for the underlying to hit breakeven.
maxOptionPricePercent: Maximum percentage of the stock price that the option premium can represent.
marginInterestRate: The interest rate used for margin-based calculations.
savingsInterestRate: The interest rate used for interest-bearing cash calculation.
relaxationPriority: The order in which filters are relaxed if no trades are found. Possible keys: targetDTE, minDTE, maxDTE, maxLossLimit, minReturnOnRisk, maxTotalDebit, maxTotalCredit, minTotalCredit, maxCAGRForBreakEven, maxUpperBreakevenDelta, maxBreakEvenPercentage, maxNetExtrinsicValueToPricePercentage, minNetExtrinsicValueToPricePercentage, ignoreEarnings.
sortPriority: The order in which found trades are sorted in the results. Possible keys: targetDTE, dte, daysToExpiration, maxLoss, returnOnRisk, breakEvenPercent, netExtrinsicValue, costSavingsPercent, breakevenCAGR.
priceVsMaxDebitRatio: Minimum ratio of the underlying price to the maximum debit of the trade.
